title: Hypixel Lobby Webfishing
description: WEBFISHING resource pack made for Hypixel Lobby Fishing
body:
![Hypixel Lobby Webfishing Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7293d992bfeabf7a59c245d0e6a17e245c5b3ba.png)

## Hypixel Lobby Fishing but with some **WEBFISHING** textures and sounds!

**This resource pack replaces some item textures and sounds with some from WEBFISHING to (hopefully) enhance your main lobby fishing experience on [Hypixel](https://hypixel.net/)**

---

Be sure to check out the actual game! [WEBFISHING - Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/3146520/WEBFISHING/)

![Water & Bobber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e2d3b5c92242af814f403c315344d386faf4ba4.png)


_I do NOT own any of the textures or sounds, they are from [WEBFISHING](https://store.steampowered.com/app/3146520/WEBFISHING/) and this [wiki](https://webfishing.wiki.gg/)_
